steps.t: Imák wants you to follow the river southward in search of the raiding-party.
By Hengi's Leap you found more tracks left by the raiding-party, but the broken bridge likely prevented them from crossing the river. They may have co…
Bloody tracks led eastward, away from the river.
Thrúgord spoke of a village of 'Bear-folk' to which the raiding-party planned to go. He must have meant the town of Limlók, to the north-east.
Venko looks out upon the Beorning village of Limlók, the obvious question on his lips: where is the raiding-party?
